name: Platform Overview
description: Cluster-wide health: node utilisation, pod counts, error rates, SLO burn rate across all tenants

widgets.title: Node CPU Utilisation (%)
widgets.nrql: SELECT average(k8s.node.cpuUsedCores / k8s.node.cpuAllocatableCores * 100) AS 'CPU %' FROM Metric WHERE cluster = 'hrs-platform' FACET nodeName TIMESERIES AUTO

widgets.title: Node Memory Utilisation (%)
widgets.nrql: SELECT average(k8s.node.memoryUsedBytes / k8s.node.memoryAllocatableBytes * 100) AS 'Memory %' FROM Metric WHERE cluster = 'hrs-platform' FACET nodeName TIMESERIES AUTO

widgets.title: Running Pods by Team
widgets.nrql: SELECT uniqueCount(k8s.pod.name) AS 'Pods' FROM Metric WHERE cluster = 'hrs-platform' AND k8s.pod.status = 'Running' FACET tenant_id

widgets.title: Pod Restart Count (last 1h)
widgets.nrql: SELECT sum(k8s.pod.restartCount) AS 'Restarts' FROM Metric WHERE cluster = 'hrs-platform' FACET k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name SINCE 1 hour ago ORDER BY Restarts DESC LIMIT 20

widgets.title: HTTP Error Rate (5xx) by Team
widgets.nrql: SELECT rate(count(*), 1 minute) AS 'Errors/min' FROM Span WHERE cluster = 'hrs-platform' AND http.status_code >= 500 FACET tenant_id TIMESERIES AUTO

widgets.title: P99 Latency by Team (ms)
widgets.nrql: SELECT percentile(duration.ms, 99) AS 'P99 ms' FROM Span WHERE cluster = 'hrs-platform' AND span.kind = 'server' FACET tenant_id TIMESERIES AUTO

widgets.title: Availability SLO — 99.9% (30-day window)
widgets.nrql: SELECT (1 - filter(count(*), WHERE http.status_code >= 500) / count(*)) * 100 AS 'Availability %' FROM Span WHERE cluster = 'hrs-platform' AND span.kind = 'server' SINCE 30 days ago

widgets.title: Error Budget Remaining
widgets.nrql: SELECT (0.001 - (filter(count(*), WHERE http.status_code >= 500) / count(*))) / 0.001 * 100 AS 'Budget Remaining %' FROM Span WHERE cluster = 'hrs-platform' AND span.kind = 'server' SINCE 30 days ago

widgets.title: Burn Rate (1h vs 6h vs 24h)
widgets.nrql: SELECT rate(filter(count(*), WHERE http.status_code >= 500), 1 hour) AS '1h error rate', rate(filter(count(*), WHERE http.status_code >= 500), 6 hours) AS '6h error rate' FROM Span WHERE cluster = 'hrs-platform' FACET tenant_id SINCE 24 hours ago
